title: "macsf"
content:
I got [Pownce][1] (with several invitations). This is number 8 service (I listed [the other 7][2] a while ago).

I think I should copy [no-i][3]'s by listing all of my services on sidebar. :)

[ Probably it's all about getting **macsf** everywhere. Hehehee ]
